focus: inventory + correctness: confidence differentiation gating and seeded-PPR wiring

findingsNew.title: Seeded-PPR recovery adds an unconditional missing compiled-module dependency
findingsNew.claim: code-graph-context.ts resolves and imports the Memory MCP compiled weighted-walk module at top level before SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_SEEDED_PPR_RANKING is checked, but the referenced dist/lib/graph/bfs-traversal.js artifact is absent from this checkout.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked .opencode/skills/**/bfs-traversal.* inventory; source files exist, but the required system-spec-kit/mcp_server/dist/lib/graph/bfs-traversal.js path does not. Checked that seeded-PPR flag gating occurs inside build/expand logic after module initialization.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: A local build step may create the Memory MCP dist artifact in some environments, but the checked-out tree does not guarantee it before importing code-graph-context.ts.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade or close if runtime startup guarantees the compiled dist artifact before code-graph-context.ts loads, or if the import becomes lazy behind the seeded-PPR flag and a flag-off/no-dist test covers it.

traceabilityChecks.spec_code: CONDITIONAL: confidence differentiation write paths are gated, but code-graph-context.ts has a default-off load-time dependency that can break existing consumers before the PPR flag is checked.
traceabilityChecks.checklist_evidence: CONDITIONAL: checklist claims flag-off regression proof, but reviewed source depends on an absent compiled Memory MCP dist artifact at module load.
